description: Case style: Analog watch with a square stainless steel case for enhanced durability Dial style: White dial with metallic hands Strap style: Grey textured genuine leather strap with a grey stitch and tang clasp for comfort and style Features: Branding on the 3 hour mark and 12 hour mark and date aperture on the 4 hour mark Screw to reset time Water resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to wear it out while swimming but not poolside diving, snorkelling or water Sports Warranty: 2 years (1 year for digital and ana-digital watches)
